subTopicTitle: The Lonely Londoners (Selvon) — Summer sequence — Carnival

items.prompt: What is the significance of the 'Summer sequence' in The Lonely Londoners by Selvon?
keyPoints: Represents a break from the struggles of immigrant life
Symbolizes hope and a sense of belonging
Highlights the temporary nature of happiness
